zh.lifeSummary: 當James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy於1454年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾易亞斯特 薩爾圖時，他的父親Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy51歲，母親Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell44歲。他於1475年與Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1510年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy于1454年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾易亞斯特 薩爾圖时，他的父亲Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy51岁，母亲Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell44岁。他于1475年与Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1510年在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy was born in 1454, in East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy, was 51 and his mother, Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell, was 44. He married Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes in 1475, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1510, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy est né en 1454, à East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes en 1475, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1510, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy 1454 in East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy 51 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell 44. Er hat 1475 in Scotland Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1510 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy è nato il nel 1454 nel East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes nel 1475, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1510, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethyが1454年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアエアスト サルトウンで生まれた時，父Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethyは51歳，母Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbellは44歳であった。1475年にスコットランドでMargaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1510年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.Saltoun, E. Lothian, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 업퍼 타운 프 살토우

ko.Saltoun, East Lothian, Scotland: 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 업퍼 타운 프 살토우
ko.lifeSummary: James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy(이)가 1454년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 이스트 살토우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1475년 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1510년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy nasceu em 1454, em East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes em 1475, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1510, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy родился в 1454 г. в местности эаст салтоун, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes в 1475 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1510 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy nació en 1454, en East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes en 1475, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1510, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
